Scenario / Test Case: Create Estimate with minimum mandatory fields
Manual Steps: Open New; enter mandatory fields; save as Draft
Expected Result: Draft is created once; number is assigned; entered data persists

Scenario / Test Case: Block save when mandatory fields are missing
Manual Steps: Open New; leave each mandatory field blank in turn; click Save
Expected Result: Save is blocked; clear field-level messages identify every missing value

Scenario / Test Case: Generate unique document number
Expected Result: Numbers are unique, sequential according to configuration, and use correct branch/FY series

Scenario / Test Case: Edit and save a draft Estimate
Test Data: Change quantity, rate, notes and address
Manual Steps: Open draft; edit fields; save; reopen
Expected Result: Latest values persist and audit history captures user and timestamp

Scenario / Test Case: Cancel Estimate from allowed status
Expected Result: Status becomes Cancelled; reason/audit trail recorded; prohibited downstream effects are reversed or absent

Scenario / Test Case: Restrict create/edit/cancel by role
Manual Steps: Try create, edit, submit, cancel and delete
Expected Result: Only authorised actions are visible and accepted by server; direct URL/API bypass is blocked

Scenario / Test Case: Search, sort and filter Estimates
Preconditions: Multiple records with varied dates/customers/statuses exist
Manual Steps: Search exact/partial text; combine filters; sort; clear filters
Expected Result: Correct records and counts appear; clear restores list; state behaves as designed

Scenario / Test Case: Validate Estimate PDF/print
Test Data: Long customer name; multiple items; discount; GST; notes
Expected Result: Number, dates, addresses, GSTIN, items, totals, terms and page breaks are correct; no clipping

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate item totals, discount, tax and round-off
Expected Result: Taxable value, GST and grand total match configured rounding rules

Scenario / Test Case: Accept, reject and expire an estimate
Manual Steps: Send estimate; mark accepted/rejected; allow validity to expire
Expected Result: Only valid transitions are allowed; status, actor and timestamp are recorded

Scenario / Test Case: Convert accepted estimate to quotation
Test Data: Two item lines with discounts and terms
Manual Steps: Convert to Quotation; save; compare source and target
Expected Result: Quotation references estimate and copies customer, items, quantities, rates, taxes and terms exactly

Scenario / Test Case: Partially convert selected estimate lines
Expected Result: Only selected lines convert; source shows converted and remaining quantities correctly

Scenario / Test Case: Confirm estimate has no ledger or stock impact
Test Data: Stock and ledger balances captured before test
Manual Steps: Submit estimate; compare balances and reports
Expected Result: No journal, receivable, tax liability, stock movement or reservation is created

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent acceptance/conversion of expired quotation
Expected Result: System blocks action or requires authorised validity extension with audit trail

Scenario / Test Case: Create quotation revision without losing history
Expected Result: New revision is identifiable; previous version remains viewable; latest version is used for conversion

Scenario / Test Case: Convert quotation fully to Sales Order
Manual Steps: Convert to Sales Order; compare documents
Expected Result: Sales Order references quotation; commercial values and pending quantities are correct

Scenario / Test Case: Partially convert quotation across multiple Sales Orders
Manual Steps: Create first partial SO; create second for remainder
Expected Result: Converted/pending quantities update after each order; cumulative order cannot exceed 100

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent conversion beyond quoted quantity
Manual Steps: Convert remaining quotation to SO with excessive qty
Expected Result: System blocks qty above remaining 2 and does not create duplicate commitment

Scenario / Test Case: Confirm quotation has no ledger or stock impact
Expected Result: No accounting, tax, stock movement or reservation unless reservation is explicitly configured

Scenario / Test Case: Handle order with insufficient stock
Preconditions: Item available qty is below order qty
Expected Result: Configured behaviour occurs: block, warn, or create backorder; available/reserved values remain consistent

Scenario / Test Case: Reserve and release stock
Manual Steps: Confirm order; inspect availability; cancel order
Expected Result: 30 is reserved on confirmation and released on cancellation; physical on-hand does not change

Scenario / Test Case: Partially fulfil Sales Order
Expected Result: SO shows ordered 100, delivered 40 and pending 60; status Partially Fulfilled

Scenario / Test Case: Fulfil order using multiple Delivery Notes
Expected Result: Cumulative delivered is 100; pending 0; order becomes Fulfilled; no over-delivery

Scenario / Test Case: Create direct partial invoice from Sales Order
Preconditions: Direct SO invoicing enabled; SO qty 10
Expected Result: Invoice references SO; invoiced 6 and pending 4; stock/ledger effect occurs once

Scenario / Test Case: Record and apply customer advance
Preconditions: Confirmed order and customer receipt account exist
Manual Steps: Record advance; later create invoice and apply it
Expected Result: Advance is posted to correct liability/customer account and reduces invoice outstanding once

Scenario / Test Case: Enforce customer credit limit
Expected Result: Configured block/warning/approval is applied and override is audited

Scenario / Test Case: Restrict material changes after fulfilment begins
Test Data: Reduce ordered qty below delivered qty; change customer
Expected Result: Invalid changes are blocked; permitted changes preserve document lineage and audit history

Scenario / Test Case: Close order with unfulfilled quantity
Expected Result: Pending quantity is closed, reservations released, reason logged, and no new conversion is allowed

Scenario / Test Case: Create full delivery from one warehouse
Preconditions: Confirmed SO and sufficient stock exist
Expected Result: Delivered and pending quantities update; configured stock movement is posted once

Scenario / Test Case: Deliver one order from multiple warehouses
Preconditions: Stock exists in A and B
Expected Result: Each warehouse movement is correct and total delivered equals 10

Scenario / Test Case: Require valid batch or serial numbers
Test Data: Valid, invalid, duplicate and expired batch/serial
Manual Steps: Add tracked item; select/enter identifiers; submit
Expected Result: Only available valid identifiers are accepted; duplicates and wrong warehouse identifiers are blocked

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent delivery beyond pending order quantity
Expected Result: System restricts delivery to remaining 2 unless authorised tolerance exists

Scenario / Test Case: Combine multiple Delivery Notes into one invoice
Preconditions: Two uninvoiced DNs for same compatible customer/tax context
Expected Result: One invoice references both DNs; each line is included once; both DNs become invoiced

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent invoicing delivered quantity twice
Expected Result: No invoiceable quantity remains; duplicate invoice creation is blocked

Scenario / Test Case: Cancel uninvoiced Delivery Note and restore availability
Manual Steps: Cancel DN; inspect stock and SO
Expected Result: Stock/reservation and SO delivered/pending values reverse exactly once

Scenario / Test Case: Block cancellation of invoiced Delivery Note
Preconditions: DN is linked to active invoice
Expected Result: Cancellation is blocked with dependency information, or controlled reversal sequence is enforced

Scenario / Test Case: Validate transporter and e-way bill fields
Test Data: Vehicle no., transporter ID, distance and document date
Manual Steps: Enter valid and invalid formats; submit
Expected Result: Applicable fields and formats are enforced; values appear correctly in output

Scenario / Test Case: Create direct cash invoice
Preconditions: Customer, cash/bank ledger, item and stock exist
Manual Steps: Create direct invoice; mark paid; post
Expected Result: Invoice posts once; outstanding is zero; receipt and sales/tax entries balance
Expected Accounting Impact: Sales/tax and cash receipt entries balance

Scenario / Test Case: Create credit invoice and receivable
Test Data: Taxable value ₹10,000; GST 18%; due in 30 days
Expected Result: Total ₹11,800; due date correct; customer outstanding increases ₹11,800
Expected Accounting Impact: Dr Customer 11,800; Cr Sales 10,000; Cr output GST 1,800

Scenario / Test Case: Invoice full Delivery Note
Expected Result: All delivered lines copy once; references/statuses update; no second stock reduction if DN already moved stock

Scenario / Test Case: Partially invoice delivered quantity
Expected Result: First leaves 4 pending; second closes DN; cumulative invoiced quantity equals 10

Scenario / Test Case: Use correct branch and financial-year invoice series
Manual Steps: Post invoices before and after FY change in two branches
Expected Result: Each series follows configuration; no duplicate statutory invoice number

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate due date from payment terms
Expected Result: Due date is 2026-08-16 or documented business-rule equivalent and appears in receivables

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate line and document discounts in correct order
Test Data: Multiple GST rates; line % discount; document fixed discount
Expected Result: Taxable allocation, GST and total follow documented policy with consistent rounding

Scenario / Test Case: Tax freight/packing according to configuration
Expected Result: Charges, GST classification, ledger postings and total are correct

Scenario / Test Case: Apply partial payment and track outstanding
Expected Result: Paid ₹5,000; outstanding ₹6,800; aging and customer ledger agree

Scenario / Test Case: Cancel unpaid invoice and reverse effects
Expected Result: Original is marked cancelled; ledger, tax, stock and source status reverse according to policy exactly once

Scenario / Test Case: Handle cancellation after payment
Expected Result: System blocks cancellation until payment is unapplied/reversed, or performs controlled linked reversal

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent duplicate posting on repeated click/refresh
Expected Result: Exactly one invoice, journal and stock transaction exist

Scenario / Test Case: Handle decimal quantity, rate and rounding
Expected Result: Line, tax and grand total follow configured precision; displayed and posted totals reconcile

Scenario / Test Case: Reject zero/negative quantity or rate unless explicitly allowed
Expected Result: Invalid commercial values are blocked with clear messages; no side effects occur

Scenario / Test Case: Return full invoice quantity
Preconditions: Posted invoice qty 10 exists and is returnable
Expected Result: Return references invoice; returnable qty becomes zero; credit note/stock/tax/accounting effects are correct

Scenario / Test Case: Return part of an invoice
Expected Result: Returned 4 and remaining returnable 6 are shown; proportional tax/discount reversal is correct

Scenario / Test Case: Process multiple partial returns
Expected Result: Cumulative returned qty reaches 10; fourth return is blocked; no duplicate reversal

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent return beyond invoiced/remaining quantity
Expected Result: System restricts return to remaining 2

Scenario / Test Case: Route damaged goods to non-saleable location
Expected Result: Customer credit is correct; stock enters damaged location and is not available for sale

Scenario / Test Case: Refund credit note to customer
Expected Result: Refund links to return/credit note; customer balance settles; bank ledger reduces once

Scenario / Test Case: Adjust return credit against another invoice
Preconditions: Customer has credit note and open invoice
Expected Result: Open invoice becomes ₹820 outstanding; credit is consumed once; ledgers reconcile

Scenario / Test Case: Process return with replacement
Manual Steps: Create return; create linked replacement delivery/invoice as configured
Expected Result: Inbound and outbound movements are distinct; financial effect follows policy; lineage is visible

Scenario / Test Case: Cancel Sales Return and reverse return effects
Expected Result: Credit, tax and inventory effects reverse once; invoice returnable quantity is restored

Scenario / Test Case: Block return cancellation after refund/adjustment
Expected Result: Cancellation is blocked until dependent settlement is reversed

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate CGST and SGST for intra-state sale
Preconditions: Supplier and place of supply are in same state
Expected Result: CGST ₹900 and SGST ₹900; no IGST; ledgers and PDF agree

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate IGST for inter-state sale
Preconditions: Supplier and place of supply differ
Expected Result: IGST ₹1,800; no CGST/SGST; ledgers and PDF agree

Scenario / Test Case: Calculate multiple GST rates in one invoice
Expected Result: Each line and rate-wise tax summary is correct; grand total reconciles

Scenario / Test Case: Handle exempt, nil-rated and non-GST items distinctly
Manual Steps: Create invoice and inspect tax/report classification
Expected Result: No tax is charged, but each supply is reported in the correct category

Scenario / Test Case: Validate GSTIN and state code
Expected Result: Valid GSTIN accepted; invalid/mismatched values blocked or explicitly warned per rule

Scenario / Test Case: Recalculate tax when place of supply changes
Manual Steps: Create invoice; change place of supply before posting
Expected Result: CGST/SGST switches to IGST and totals/ledgers update with no stale tax rows

Scenario / Test Case: Create export invoice with LUT/no tax
Preconditions: Export customer and LUT configuration exist
Manual Steps: Create export invoice without payment of tax
Expected Result: Zero-rated/export flags, currency, shipping and statutory declarations are correct

Scenario / Test Case: Reverse GST proportionally on Sales Return
Preconditions: Tax invoice partly returned within allowed policy
Expected Result: Taxable value and relevant GST components reverse by 40%; reports reconcile

Scenario / Test Case: Validate HSN/SAC on goods and services
Expected Result: Required HSN/SAC is enforced and correct code appears line-wise and in output

Scenario / Test Case: Complete Estimate-to-Invoice lifecycle
Expected Result: Every target references its source; values and quantities remain consistent; final ledger/stock effects occur once

Scenario / Test Case: Process partial delivery and invoicing
Manual Steps: Execute deliveries and invoices in sequence
Expected Result: At every step ordered/delivered/invoiced/pending quantities reconcile to 100

Scenario / Test Case: Invoice, partially return and settle credit
Manual Steps: Create return; issue credit; refund or adjust
Expected Result: Stock, sales, GST, customer and bank/settlement balances reconcile end-to-end

Scenario / Test Case: Create Sales Order directly and invoice without DN
Manual Steps: Create SO; convert directly to invoice
Expected Result: References and status are correct; stock decreases exactly once at configured stage

Scenario / Test Case: Two users fulfil the same remaining quantity concurrently
Preconditions: SO remaining qty 5; two users logged in
Expected Result: Only total remaining 5 is committed; second user receives conflict/refresh message

Scenario / Test Case: Trace document lineage and audit history
Manual Steps: Open each document and audit/related-documents views
Expected Result: Source/target links, field changes, status changes, user, time and reasons are complete and immutable

Scenario / Test Case: Create customer inline without losing document data
Manual Steps: Enter lines; create customer inline; return
Expected Result: New customer is selected and all unsaved document lines remain intact

Scenario / Test Case: Create/select item and enforce inactive status
Manual Steps: Add active item; attempt inactive item
Expected Result: Active item adds with defaults; inactive item is hidden or blocked with explanation

Scenario / Test Case: Convert alternate UOM accurately
Manual Steps: Add item in boxes; convert through flow
Expected Result: Quantities display consistently and base stock movement equals 20 each

Scenario / Test Case: Upload, view and remove allowed attachments
Expected Result: Allowed files work; invalid files are rejected safely; removal is audited

Scenario / Test Case: Prevent stored/reflected script injection in text fields
Expected Result: Input is safely encoded/sanitised; no script executes; document remains usable

Scenario / Test Case: Preserve or clearly handle unsaved data on session timeout
Manual Steps: Wait for timeout; attempt save; re-authenticate
Expected Result: No silent data loss; user gets clear recovery/re-authentication behaviour

Scenario / Test Case: Load and save a large document
Manual Steps: Add/import 500 lines; calculate; save; reopen; print
Expected Result: Meets agreed response-time target; calculations correct; UI remains usable; no timeout/duplicate

Scenario / Test Case: Operate core form using keyboard and labels
Manual Steps: Navigate, select customer/item, save and resolve validation
Expected Result: Logical focus order, visible focus, usable controls and readable validation labels
